raw_source.title: [Remote] Zuzalu.city is looking for Front-End Developer
raw_source.body:
### About Zuzalu.City:
We are building an easy-to-use interface that serves as a collective [operation system](https://zuzalu.craft.me/5w531Ph3lt9Sfi) that connects users to decentralised, open-sourced and autonomous applications that are empowered with privacy choices for a community when it comes to coordination, contribution and collaboration.

### About Ethereum Community Fund:
We are an early-stage project currently building the Alpha, with a mission of creating an inclusive destination bwhere users can publish, discover, contribute, share and fund blockchain development projects focusing on Web3 technology. lnformation about projects and interests in projects are focused into a unified, open and user-friendly platform and all information is curated and governed by the platform community.

You will be working with a competent, fun and inclusive team based across different time zones, from different backgrounds and nationalities, dedicated to the development and growth of the community platform and Web3 tech.

### Role: Front-End Developer
**Remote | Full-time**

We are looking for a talented Front-End Engineer to build and maintain cutting-edge Web3 applications that empower users within our ecosystem. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to create highly interactive and seamless user interfaces that align with our product vision and business objectives.

### Responsibilities

- Develop pixel-perfect and UX-optimized Web3 applications using TypeScript and Next.js.
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define, prioritize, and implement features that meet both user and business needs.
- Ensure components are functional, intuitive, performant, and mobile-responsive.
- Maintain high-quality code standards, including efficient documentation and testing.

### Requirements

- 2+ years of experience in frontend engineering, with a strong command of TypeScript and React.
- Solid experience working in Web3, with proficiency in Web3 libraries such as ethers.js, wagmi, and viem.
- Experience in building and maintaining production-grade SDKs, APIs, or systems at scale.
- A passion for creating elegant, user-friendly, and performant interfaces that empower users in the Web3 space.

### Personal

- Highly self-motivated/self-driven
- Insatiably hungry to learn and grow
- Fluent in English
- Highly reliable/Ability to meet deadlines ahead of time
- Focus on solutions mentality!
- Comfortable with an adaptive fast-paced startup environment.
- Ability to work in a diverse multi-disciplinary team.
- Sense of humour is a plus!

We understand that not every applicant will know everything. If you think you have what it takes and are willing to learn, send your CV & cover letter to hello@ecf.network!!

Socials:

- X: https://x.com/Zuzalu_city
- Warpcast: https://warpcast.com/zuzalucity
- Medium: https://medium.com/@Zuzalu_city
- Paragraph: https://paragraph.xyz/@zuzalu
